sentence_reviews.text: Representations aim to recover stable causal factors and mechanisms rather than only predictive correlations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: causal representation learning as discovery of high-level causal variables from low-level observations; causality helps transfer and generalization.
sentence_reviews.notes: The inspected source directly supports causal variables and causality beyond standard prediction; 'stable factors and mechanisms' is a synthesis rather than an exact quote.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Causal representation learning is to connect Causal inference, Latent variables & hidden state to downstream capabilities including Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins, Medical imaging & clinical decision support.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: relates causal inference to ML, transfer, generalization, high-level causal variables from low-level observations; AIMA contents: probabilistic models, uncertainty, learning, robotics/vision chapters.
sentence_reviews.notes: The causal inference and latent-variable connection is supported, but the specific downstream capabilities are not directly established by inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: causality contributes to ML research, transfer, and generalization; no explicit scientific ML/digital twin example inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: Scientific modeling relevance is plausible, but the exact downstream example is broader than the source evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Medical imaging & clinical decision support
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: causal inference and ML generally; no medical imaging or clinical decision support passage inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: The inspected evidence does not support this domain-specific downstream claim.

sentence_reviews.text: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Causal inference, Latent variables & hidden state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: transfer/generalization and causal variables; AIMA contents: causal/probabilistic learning background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Mismatch with data-generating process is consistent with causal/generalization concerns, but the exact generic limitation is not directly supported.

sentence_reviews.text: Causal representation learning uses Causal inference as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: reviews causal inference concepts and relates them to ML; causal representation learning is a central problem for AI and causality.

sentence_reviews.text: Causal representation learning uses Latent variables & hidden state as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: discovery of high-level causal variables from low-level observations; PML source listed for latent-variable background but not directly inspected beyond packet metadata.
sentence_reviews.notes: High-level causal variables from observations support a latent-representation dependency, though the wording uses atlas terminology.

sentence_reviews.text: Causal representation learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: causal representation learning and ML generally; no specific supervised setup inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: Supervised signals can be used in some causal representation work, but the field is not inherently supervised.

sentence_reviews.text: Causal representation learning follows the learning setup expressed by Unsupervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Scholkopf et al. 2021 abstract: discovery of high-level causal variables from low-level observations; no explicit unsupervised setup inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: Discovery from observations makes unsupervised representation learning plausible, but the inspected evidence does not establish the relationship type exactly.

edge_reviews.notes: The source directly frames causal representation learning at the intersection of causality and ML, using causal inference concepts.
Recovering high-level causal variables from low-level observations supports latent-variable dependency and core strength.
Some methods may be supervised, but the inspected evidence does not show supervised learning as the narrow setup for the field.
Unsupervised discovery is plausible but not directly established as the field's training setup by inspected evidence.
